chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.97 of 2024 Muhammad Haroon Shaikh Versus Sindh Bar Council & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of main case 2. For orders on CMA 605/24 Dated: 28.10.2024 Appellant Mr. Muhammad Haroon Shaikh Advocate present in person. -.-.- Appellant who is appearing in person does not press this High Court Appeal, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Chief Justice Judge
